## API and Release Impact

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Touches public API? | Yes / No |
| Semver impact | Major / Minor / Patch / None |
| Changelog impact | Features / Bug Fixes / Performance / Refactors / Hidden / None |
| Migration note needed? | Yes / No |

If this changes public API, link the relevant test or explain why no test is
needed.

## Test Plan

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] Linked an approved issue
- [ ] Added exactly one `type:*` label
- [ ] Updated tests for behavior or public API changes
- [ ] Updated docs/examples for user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] Included migration notes for breaking changes
- [ ] Used conventional commit format
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailers
